reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 이미 가지고 있는데 강아지 최애템이라 낡아서 새걸로 재구매 했어요.
reviews.content_en: My pup already has one and it's her absolute favorite, so I repurchased it since the old one wore out.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
판매자님, 개발자님 넘넘 감사드려용! 개린이날 선물로 다가 장만 했는데 몇주가 지나도록 곰도리 캔디공만 물고 와용ㅎㅎ 공세트도 알록달록 쨍한 색감이 귀엽기도 하지만 무엇보다 아이가 너무 좋아하니 아직 새것 마냥 멀쩡해도 또 한세트를 더 사서 공밭으로 만들어 줘볼까 싶기도 하네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ아무튼 무척 만족합니다. 
저희집 아이는 2.5kg 토이 푸들인데 입이 작아 그런지 크기 선택이 조금이라도 잘못되거나 무거우면 잘 안가지고 놀더라고요. 그런데 이 제품은 공 안쪽이 오돌토돌 돌기로 되어 있고 겉면이 보드랍게 쌓여 있어서 입안에 부담이 작을 것 같고, 무게도 가볍고 통통통 가볍기 까지해서 제가 던져 주기도 좋네요. 잘 산 건 같아요.
reviews.content_en: Thank you so much to the seller and developer! 😊 I got everything as a gift for my first time having a dog, and for weeks now my pup has been carrying around only the BITE ME gummy bear ball 😂 The ball set has cute, vibrant colors, but most importantly my baby loves it so much that even though it still looks brand new, I'm thinking about getting another set to turn our place into a ball paradise 😆 Anyway, I'm very satisfied. My pup is a 2.5kg toy poodle, and since she has a small mouth, if the size is even slightly off or it's too heavy, she won't play with it much. But this product has bumpy textures on the inside of the ball and a soft outer surface, so it shouldn't put much strain on her mouth. Plus it's lightweight and bounces really well, making it great to throw for her too. I think I made a great purchase.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
다른 강아지들이 한 개정도는 무조건 가지고 있던 바잇미 공..!!! 우리 애기도 사줘야겠다는 생각이 있었는데 애카에서 하나 사주니 너무너무 좋아하더라구요 바로 본품 구매 했습니다 ㅎㅎ 
공을 원래도 좋아하는데 완전 대흥분 상태까지 갈 정도로 엄청 엄청 좋아해요! 공이 통통 튀어서 잡으려고 같이 통통 튀더라구요 
던져줄때도 살살 던져도 알아서 튀니 사람도 편해요 

댕댕 키우는 집 필수 아이템..!!! 너무 조아용❤️
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME ball that other dogs pretty much always have one of!!! 😆 I was thinking I should get one for my pup too, and when I got a sample version, she absolutely loved it, so I bought the full product right away 😊 She already loves balls, but she gets SO excited about this one that she bounces around trying to catch it! When I throw it, even a gentle toss makes it bounce on its own, so it's easy for me too. An absolute must-have for dog parents!!! I love it so much ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이거 진짜 잘샀어요! 세일도 아니거 그냥 다목적세제 사기엔 아쉬워서 하나 사봤은데 첨에 좀 비싸서 고민햌ㅅ거든요 근데 멍멍이 입사이즈에도 딱이거 바잇ㅌ스팟도 있고 멍멍이가 아주 조아해요!! 여튼 너무 안커서 좋습니닷 강추강추
reviews.content_en: I really love this purchase! It wasn't even on sale, and I was hesitant to just buy a multi-purpose cleaner, so I grabbed one of these, though I did worry about the price at first 😅 But it's perfect for my pup's mouth size, and it even has a BITE ME spot that my doggy absolutely loves!! Anyway, it's not too big which is great. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 공 좋아하는 갱얼쥐 가족들,,,
지나치지 마시고 꼭 사세요 ㅠㅠㅜㅜㅜ 
저희집 애기 환장합니다 ㅠㅠㅜ
reviews.content_en: Families with squeaky ball-loving fur babies... don't pass this up! Please buy it 😭 My baby is obsessed with it 😭

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content: 바잇미 인형중에 곰도리 캔디 공을 제일 좋아해요 한번에 왕창 쟁여두기 필수템
reviews.content_en: Among the BITE ME toys, I love the gummy bear ball the most. Definitely a must-have to stock up on!

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 신상으로 나왔을때 부터 몇 개째 구매하는 지 모를 정도네요 ㅎㅎㅎ   집에 쟁여둡니당 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I've lost count of how many I've bought since it came out as a new product 😄 I keep a stash at home 😆

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
80일된 장모치와와 몸무게 500g
처음에는 어떻게 가지고 놀지 잘 모르는 듯 싶더니 이제는 혼자서도 잘 가지고 놀아요~
reviews.content_en: My 80-day-old long-haired chihuahua weighing 500g - at first she didn't seem to know how to play with it, but now she plays with it well all on her own~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
파브의 애착공입니다!
여러 공을 던져줘봤지만 그 중 으뜸은 바잇미 캔디 공이에요
공에 달린 작은 귀는 입에 물고 으르르 털기 좋구요
삑삑소리도 크지 않아 적당하구요
천으로 되어있어서 깨물기도 무섭지 않아요
천 안쪽에 고무는 약간 오돌돌한 공이 들어있는 것 같네요
아기자기한 색도 구별이 가나봐요
그냥 좋아할 수 밖에 없아요
바잇미의 캔디공이면 파브는 세상 행복해질 수 있어요🖤

바스락거리는 비닐봉투부터 좋아하구요,
늘 항상 물고오는 공이에요 ㅋㅋ

단점은 때가 잘 타고 자주 사라져요 ㅎㅎ
공찾이와~ 가져와~ 를 훈련시켰지만
집중력 떨어지면 개무시해서 잘 정리해놔야 해요 ㅋㅋㅠ
엄마집에도 둘 겸 하나 더 구매합니닷!
reviews.content_en: It's Pave's favorite ball! I've thrown many different balls, but the BITE ME candy ball is the top choice. The little ears attached to the ball are great to grab and shake. The squeaky sound isn't too loud either. It's made of fabric so it's not scary to chew on. It seems like there's a slightly bumpy rubber ball inside the fabric. The cute colors seem to help him distinguish it too. He just can't help but love it. With BITE ME's candy ball, Pave becomes the happiest pup in the world 🖤 He even likes the crinkly plastic bag it comes in, and it's always the ball he brings back 😆 The downside is that it gets dirty easily and tends to disappear 😄 I even trained him to "find the ball" and "bring it here," but when he loses focus he ignores me completely, so I have to keep it organized 😭 I'm buying another one to keep at my mom's house too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
요거요거 딱 아가 던지기 놀이용이에욤!!
짱짱하고 아주 굿입니다. 삑삑이 인형 사면 쫌 약한 애들도 있잖아요?! 근데 진짜 짱짱해요!! 쉽게 찢어지지 않을 고런 아이^^ 세개라서 집에서 던지기 놀이 할때나 잘때 들고 가기도 하네요ㅎㅎ 귀엽습니다.
reviews.content_en: This is perfect for playing catch with your pup!! It's super durable and really great! Some squeaky toys are kind of flimsy, right?! But this one is seriously tough!! It doesn't tear easily, which is awesome^^ Since there are three, we use them for playtime and he even carries one to bed 😊 They're adorable.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
3번 째 구매에요..😂
삑삑이가 죽어서 사고,, 이웃 친구들 하나씩 나눠줘서 사고,, 근데 안 살 수가 없어요.. 
저희 강아지 최애 장난감이거든요💕
이렇게 오랫동안 좋아하는 장난감은 처음인거 같아요!
새 제품 숨겨놓은 곳을 찾아서 하나 물고나오면 그렇게 행복해 할 수가 없습니다🐶 이렇게 좋아하는데 우떻게 안사겠어요,, 돈없어도 사야죠 뭐🥲
오늘 아침에도 곰도리 캔디 몇 번 던지고 왔더라..
빨간색 153720번,,, 초록색163928번,,,,
누나=공 던지는 사람,,
reviews.content_en:
This is my 3rd purchase..😂
The squeaker died, so I bought it again.. I shared one with each of my neighbor friends.. but I just can't help buying it.
It's my dog's favorite toy ever💕
I think this is the first toy my dog has liked for this long!
Whenever I find where I hid the new toy and he grabs it, he's so happy🐶 How could I not buy it when he loves it this much.. I'd buy it even if I had no money🥲
I threw the Gummy Candy ball a few times this morning too..
Red one 153720.. Green one 163928...
Sister = the person who throws the ball..

reviews.content:
친구집에서 발견하고 아기가 너무 좋아해서 구매했네요 ㅎㅎ
진심으로 최애탬되어서 매일 아침에 입에 물고 다녀요 ㅎㅎㅎ
정말 넘 사랑스러움 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en:
Found it at a friend's house and my pup loved it so much I bought one 😄
It's become her absolute favorite and she carries it in her mouth every morning 😄😄
It's seriously the cutest thing 😭😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애기댕댕이한테 사이즈가 딱이에요! 
누워있으면 놀아달라고 물고오는데 졸귀ㅠ
공친자 되는중
reviews.content_en:
The size is perfect for my baby pup!
When she's lying down, she picks it up to ask me to play with her - so adorable😭
I'm turning into a ball-throwing machine 😂

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
저희 강쥐 최애템ㅋㅋ
강해서 삑삑이가 잘 죽지도 않아요
소형견 한입거리?라서 엄청 잘가지고 놀아요
침범벅이라 자주 사서 바꿔주고있어요
reviews.content_en:
My pup's favorite toy!!😂
It's tough so the squeaker doesn't die easily
Since it's small enough for tiny dogs to carry, she plays with it constantly
It gets drooled on a lot so I buy replacements often!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이렇게 이뻐요 되나요???  이렇게 이쁘고 귀염뽀짝한 삑삑이 처음 봤네요ㅜㅜ
그리고 솜이 없다보니 솜 빼는 아이들도 솜을 안 빼고 정상적이게 놀고 진짜 넘 만족해서 개린이날 선물로 사줄까 생각중이예요!
reviews.content_en:
Can something be this cute??? This is my first time seeing such a pretty and adorable squeaker toy 😭😭
Also, since there's no stuffing, even dogs that usually pull out stuffing don't destroy it and just play normally. I'm so satisfied I'm thinking of buying it as a gift for Dog Day!

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 고무재질 장난감을 엄청 좋아하는데 항상 물어뜯어 금방 고장나고 심지어 물어뜯어 먹었는데 이 장난감은 천으로 씌워져 있어서 그럴걱정도 없이 삑삑 소리도 나서 너무 좋아해요!.! 저희집 강아지가 크지 않아서 큰장난감은 잘 못 무는데 이건 크기도 적당히 작아서 너무 좋아요 제일 좋아하는 장난감이에요 :)
reviews.content_en: My dog loves rubber toys but always chews them and they break quickly - he's even eaten pieces before. But this toy is covered in fabric so I don't worry about that, and it makes squeaking sounds so he loves it!!😂 My dog isn't big so he can't really bite large toys, but this one is a perfect size - not too big! It's his favorite toy :)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 진짜 너무 좋아해요. 한번에 두개 주고 하나는 아는 강아지 줬는데 울집 강아지처럼 넘~ 좋아해요. 우리집 강아지는 계속 저거만 가지고 놀아요 ~입에 딱 맞는 사이즈의 공이라서 그런가? 물고서 이리저리 돌아다니고 ~ 이거 진짜 추천해요! 소형견인 친구들한테 좋을 것 같아용
reviews.content_en: My dog really really loves it. I gave two at once and gave one to another dog I know, and he loves it just as much as my pup does. My dog just keeps playing with that one toy. Maybe it's because it's a ball that fits perfectly in his mouth? He carries it around in his mouth all day~ I really recommend this! I think it'd be great for small dog friends!

reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content:
나는야 집착쟁이~~
비닐 뜯기도 전에 자기 건 줄 알고는
빨리 내놔라고 난리가 나더니
결국 물고 세개다 잡고 하루 종일 움직이지 않아요 집착쟁이 … 사이즈도 좋고 ~ 좋아하네요
알록달록 너무 귀여워요 ~~
reviews.content_en:
I'm such an obsessive one~~
Before I even opened the package, she knew it was hers
and started demanding I give it to her right away
Eventually she grabbed all three and hasn't put them down all day.
Obsessive one... The size is good too~ she loves it
It's so colorful and cute~~

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 친구네 강아지 선물용으로 샀습니다. 생각보다 작아서 소형견에게 좋을 것 같어요. 원래 선물하려던 친구 말고 다른 친구네 강아지에게 선물하고, 그 친구는 강아지가 좀 커서 다른거 사서 선물하려구요. 그래도 상품 자체는 너무너무 귀엽고 삑삑이 소리가 일반 삑삑이 소리보다 더 귀여워요..!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift for a friend's dog. It's smaller than I expected so it seems perfect for small dogs. I ended up giving it to a different friend's dog instead of the one I originally intended, and I'm planning to buy something else for that friend whose dog is bigger. Still, the product itself is so so cute and the squeaker sound is cuter than a regular squeaker!!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
오월이가 바잇미 삑삑이 짱 좋아하는데..
1년만에 공이 사망해버려서.. 재구매했어요 ㅠ
미용하고와서 기분 안좋았는데 딱 배송온 공 보고 세상 신나버려서 n시간 동안 공던졌슴다🥲
택은 일단 오자마자 다 뗐는데.. 아 역시나 귀만 집중 공략 하더니…뜯기기 전에 뺏어서 가위로 싹둑 잘라줬어요!
근데 아마 곧 저 공 옷도 벗겨질거에요..ㅎ 또 공만 남겠져🫠
이번에는 좀 오래가길 바래서 여러개 구매했어요!
사진은 다른 곰도리 바잇미 제품입니다
reviews.content_en:
Owol really loves the BITE ME squeaker ball..
After a year the ball finally died.. so I repurchased it ㅠ
He wasn't in a good mood after grooming but seeing the ball arrive, he got so excited and I threw it for him for hours🥲
I took off all the tags right away.. but sure enough, he focused on the ears and tried to tear them off so I grabbed it and cut them with scissors!
But the ball will probably lose its fabric soon too..ㅎ Just the rubber ball will be left🫠
I'm hoping it lasts a bit longer this time so I bought several!
The photo is of a different Gummy BITE ME product

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
넘귀야워요
금방뜯기긴해도 꽤오래갖고놀아서 
하나더 사줬어요.
갖고놀아주기도 좋아요
통통 귀엽게 튕겨나가고 가벼워서 입으로 물때 아프지 않겠어요
서비스로 받은 간식도 넘 잘먹네요.
맛있게 생겼어요
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! 🥰 Even though it gets torn up pretty quickly, my pup plays with it for quite a while, so I ended up buying another one. It's great for interactive play too - it bounces around so cute and light that it won't hurt their mouth when they bite it. The treats we got as a bonus are also a huge hit. They look delicious!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 정❤️말💚귀여워💛 우리 강아지 최애 공이 이렇게 생긴 공인데 그동안 많은 브랜드 샀지만 이렇게 말랑하고 입 사이즈에 딱맞는건 바잇미가 최고 ㅎㅎ 여러분 얼른 사세요 눈돌아갑니다
reviews.content_en: So incredibly cute ❤️💚💛 This is my dog's favorite ball, and while I've bought from many brands, BITE ME makes the softest balls that fit perfectly in my pup's mouth - hands down the best haha Everyone, buy it right now, your eyes will roll back 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
추천받아서 주문했는데~ 생각보다 너무좋아해요~~♡
부드럽고 앙증맞아서 휴대용으로도 좋고~ 공이 탱탱볼처럼 부드럽고잘튕겨서~ 사용하기너무 편해요~ 애착공될꺼같아요~~~
reviews.content_en: I ordered it based on a recommendation and it's SO much better than I expected~~ ♡ It's soft and adorable, so it's great for on-the-go too~ The ball is bouncy like a bouncy ball and springs back really well~ It's so easy to use~ I think it'll become a favorite toy~~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저번에 곰도리캔디를 사서 댕댕이친구들이랑 난눠서 놀았는데 물기도 좋은 사이즈라서 딱 좋아하고 오돌도돌하게 물기도 좋게되어있고 표면도 극세사라서 좋은가봐요 탱탱볼처럼 애기들이 튕겨지는게 좋아하는것도 장점인데 가져오자마자  금방 삑삑이 소리가 나지않는 불량이 있네요 일.이천원하는것도 아닌데 또 시켰는데 좀 신경써줏셨으면합니다
reviews.content_en: Last time I bought the bear candy ball and my pup and their friends shared and played with it - the bite size is perfect and it has a great bumpy texture that feels good to chew, plus the surface is microfiber which seems to be a hit. The babies love how it bounces like a bouncy ball, which is another plus, but right when we got it the squeaker stopped working - it was defective. It's not like it costs a fortune either, and I ordered another one, so I wish you'd pay a bit more attention to quality control.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
초소형견 입에도 물기쉬운 크기에
탄성이 진짜 좋네요 압력감도 좋아서 잘 물고 놓질않아요 ㅠㅠ여태 공놀이 한다고 이것저것 여러 공들을 사봤지만 이게 원탑입니다. 
이리저리 눌러도 소리나서 흥미유발에도 더 좋은 것 같아요🥹✨️
reviews.content_en: The size is easy for my tiny dog to pick up, and the elasticity is really great! The pressure feels good so they grab it and won't let go ㅠㅠ Out of all the different balls I've bought for fetch over the years, this is #1. Even when I squeeze it different ways it makes a sound, which seems to spark more interest too 🥹✨

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 사도사도 부족하네요..ㅋ 작은공 이라  하나씩 나눠주기도 너무좋고 우리강아지도 몇개가있어도 또사게되네요..예전공은 좀 무겁고 삑삑이 소리도 잘고장나고 소리도 까랑하지 않았는데 요번에 구입한건 단점이 보완된듯 더 좋네요 ..역시나 새장난감환장합니다
reviews.content_en: We can never have enough of these haha Since they're small balls, it's great to give them one each, and even though my dog has several, I keep buying more.. The old balls were a bit heavy and the squeaker broke easily with a harsh sound, but these new ones seem to have addressed those issues and are so much better.. Really, new toys make dogs go crazy 😍

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
옛날에 부산에서 바잇미 매장이 소품샵인줄 알고 갓다가 제일 작은 곰도리캔디공을 선물용으로 처음 사봤었는데 그때 받은 강아지들 전부 반응이 좋았어요 
죄다 소형견 친구들이라 한입에 물수있는 캔디공을 되게 좋아하더라구요

친구네 강아지 클스마스 선물 준다고 캔디공 샀는데 역시나 좋아하네요 초록색 공이 좋은가봐요
reviews.content_en: Back in the day I went to the BITE ME store in Busan thinking it was a gift shop, and I first bought the smallest bear candy ball as a gift - all the dogs I gave it to had great reactions. They were all small breed friends and they really loved being able to fit the candy ball in their mouths in one bite. I bought the candy ball as a Christmas gift for a friend's dog and it's a hit as expected! They seem to really love the green ball 💚

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 동생네 가면 이 장난감을 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 주문했어요ㅎㅎ 두마리 강아지 중 한마리가 나이가 조금씩 들면서 공놀이를 잘 안했는데 요고 오고는 맨날 물고와서 던져달라고 해서 산 보람이 있어요ෆ 공놀이 안 좋아하는 둘째는 혼자 오물오물 하면서 놀아요ㅎㅎ 장난감이 한 바구니 있어도 요게 최고네용
reviews.content_en: When I go to my brother's place, my dog plays with this toy SO well, so I ordered it haha One of my two dogs started not playing with balls as much as they got older, but once this arrived they carry it around and ask me to throw it all the time - totally worth it ෆ The second one who doesn't like ball games just gnaws and plays with it by themself hehe Even with a basket full of toys, this one is the best!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
애카에서 우연히 다른집 강아지 인형을 저희애가 뺏어서 놀았는데 
제가 뺏어서 드리면 또 뺏고 드리면 또 뺏고 하다가
저희애가 이거 너무 좋아하는거 같길래 
제가 이 삑삑이 어디서 사셨냐고 물어보니 바잇미에서 샀다고 하시면서 이거 그냥 가져가서 놀게 하시라고 해서 얻은 노란 곰돌이 입니다
애가 집에 인형이 엄청 많은데도 이것만 가지고 놀다가 저렇게 껍데기가 뜯겨져도 껍데기를 물고 다니고 했었어요 ㅠㅠ 
이게 계속 품절 이어서 고객센터에도 여러번 입고문의 드리고 입고 되자마자 겨우 산 곰도리 입니다!!
이게 배송된 날부터 갑자기 급성 장염이 와서 아무것도 먹지도 못하고 힘들어 하고 있는 와중에도 움직일 때마다 저 주황색 곰도리삑삑이를 물고 다니네요 ㅠㅠ
빨리 컨디션 좋아져서 그렇게 좋아하는 곰도리 삑삑이로 신나게 놀면 좋겠습니다 ㅠㅡㅠ
reviews.content_en: At my dog's daycare, my pup somehow grabbed another dog's toy and was playing with it. When I'd take it away and give it back, they'd grab it again, and I could tell my dog really loved it, so I asked the owner where they got this squeaker. They said it was from BITE ME and just told me to take it home so my pup could play with it - that's how we got this yellow bear. Even though my dog has tons of toys at home, they only play with this one, and even when the outer shell gets torn off like this, they carry the shell around in their mouth ㅠㅠ Because this kept being out of stock, I contacted customer service several times asking about restocks, and I finally managed to buy it as soon as it came back in stock! The toy arrived and then my pup suddenly came down with acute gastroenteritis and couldn't eat anything or play much, but they keep carrying around that orange bear squeaker every time they move ㅠㅠ I really hope their condition improves soon so they can have fun playing with that bear squeaker they love so much ㅠㅡㅠ

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 선물받아서 엄청 잘가지고 놀다가 하나 잃어버려서 더샀어요 촉감인지 소리인지는 모르겠으나 다른공은 쳐다도 안보네요^^
reviews.content_en: My dog was playing with the gift toy SO well that when we lost one, I bought another. I'm not sure if it's the texture or the sound, but my dog won't even look at other balls anymore ^^

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 귀여운 장난감이 3개나돼서, 동생네 새로 입양된 아기강아지에게도 선물했더니 너무 잘 가지고 노네요~♡
reviews.content_en: Got 3 cute toys, and I even gave them as a gift to my sibling's newly adopted puppy, and he plays with them so well~♡

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content:
아가 입이 작아서 보통의 장난감들은 잘 갖고 못 놀아요 !! 
곰도리 캔디 공 장난감 크기 적혀있는거보고 
작아서 잘 가지고 놀 수 있겠다 생각해서 구매했어용
사진과 보다시피 너무 잘 갖고 놀아욬ㅋㅋ 삑삑이 소리도 크게크게 잘 나고 크기도 입 작은 아가들한테 맞춤인 것 같아욤
3개나 들어있어서 하나 망가져도 더 있으니까 안심입니다 💗
reviews.content_en: My pup has a small mouth so she can't really play with regular toys!! After seeing the Gom Dori Candy Ball toy listing with its size, I thought she'd be able to hold and play with it since it's small, so I bought it~ And just like in the photos, she plays with it so well lol The squeaky sound is nice and loud too, and the size seems perfect for puppies with small mouths! Since there are 3 included, even if one breaks I have backups 💗

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
미안하다…곰돌아… ㅋㅋㅋ
우리 애기한테는 껌이에요ㅋㅋㅋ 그래도 곰돌이 뜯고나면 안에 탱탱볼같은 공이 있어서 그걸 또 어찌나 좋아하는지~
그 공을 진짜 좋아해요! 근데 저도 그 공이 진짜 좋아요~엄청 탱글탱글 던져줄때도 통통 잘 뛰고 솟아오르거든용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Sorry... Gom Dori... lol My baby treats it like a chew toy lol But after she tears up the Gom Dori, there's this bouncy ball-like ball inside that she absolutely loves~ She really loves that ball! And honestly I love it too~it's so springy and bouncy when you throw it lol

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 예전에도 이 삑삑이 장난감을 사서 준 적이 있는데 그때 너무 잘 가지고 놀았었어요! 저희 애들은 장난감을 주면 2분 안에 망가트려서 금방 버리는데 이건 꽤 오래 가지고 놀더라고요! 삑삑이도 다른 것과 다르게 엄청 오래가고 잘 안 망가져서 좋았어요! 그 기억으로 똑같은 제품을 또 구매했어요! 역시나 엄청 좋아하네요!
reviews.content_en: I bought this squeaky toy before and my pup played with it so much! My kids usually destroy toys within 2 minutes and throw them away, but this one lasted quite a while! The squeaker especially lasts way longer than other toys and doesn't break easily, which was great! I remembered how much she loved it so I bought the same product again! And sure enough, she absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 평소 아이들이 유독 바잇미 장난감을 좋아해요. 다른 장난감보다 튼튼해서 꽤 오랫동안 가지고 놀 수 있어서 좋아요. 다른 봉제 장난감은 주면 5분 컷으로 망가지는데 바잇미는 안 그래요. 가격이 살짝 있는 편이지만 아이들 반응이 좋아서 만족스럽습니다.
reviews.content_en: My kids especially love BITE ME toys. They're more durable than other toys so they can play with them for quite a long time. Other plush toys break in like 5 minutes, but BITE ME doesn't. The price is a bit high but the kids' reaction is so good that I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 바잇미삑삑이 최애 장난감이라 이장난감만 두세트째 이용중이에요 3개나주셔서 구성도좋고 잘가지고놀아요!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME's squeaky toy is my favorite toy so I'm on my second or third set! It comes with 3 so the set is great and my pup plays with it so well!

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 이건 제가 신사동 바잇미 카페 갔을 때부터 탐내던건데 왜 그때 안사구 그냥 왔나 후회합니다... 저희집 애기가 진짜 활발하구 던져주면 물어오는 놀이를 엄청 좋아하는데 이건 탱탱볼처럼 튕기더라구여! ㅎㅎㅎ ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그래서 던져줘서 달려가면 다른데로 튕겨져 가버리니까 발 동동 구르면서 공 따라 고개 움직이는 뒷모습이 너무 웃기면서 귀엽습니당 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 사이즈도 물기 좋아서 잘 물고 다니는데 걸을 때마다 삑삑 소리 나는것도 귀여워요ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ 흐앙 천으로 덧데어져 있어서 튼튼하구 더 안전하게 가지고 놀 수 있을거 같아용ㅇ~~
reviews.content_en: I've been wanting this since I went to the BITE ME cafe in Sinsa-dong, and I regret not buying it then... My pup is really active and loves the fetch and retrieve game, and this bounces like a bouncy ball! lol When I throw it and she runs after it, it bounces off somewhere else, so watching her wiggle her feet and move her head following the ball is so funny and cute lol The size is also great for biting and she carries it around, and the squeaky sound with each step is adorable too ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ It's wrapped in cloth so it's durable and seems safe to play with~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 곰돌이가 잘 찢어지지 않을까 걱정했는데 부들부들한 천에 마감처리가 잘 되어있어서 튼튼하네요. 색깔도 알록달록 예쁘구요 곰돌이 얼굴도 넘 귀여워요. 무엇보다 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고노네요. 공을 튕겨주면 통통 튕겨나가요. 공이 가벼워 쿵쿵소리도 나지 않아서 층간소음에도 걱정없답니다. 근데 저희 집에 온 초록곰돌이공은 불량으로 삑삑이 소리가 나지 않네요ㅠㅠ교환이 번거롭기도 하고, 애기도 잘 가지고놀아서 교환 안하고 그냥 사용하려구요! 망가진다면 재구매의사 200프로입니다! 곰돌이 공 장난감 추천추천이요~!
reviews.content_en: I was worried the Gom Dori would tear easily, but the soft fabric is well-finished so it's quite durable. The colors are also pretty and colorful, and the Gom Dori's face is so cute. Most importantly, my pup plays with it so well! When you bounce the ball, it bounces away nicely. The ball is light so it doesn't make loud thudding sounds, so no worries about noise between floors. But the green Gom Dori ball that came to our house seems to be defective - the squeaker doesn't make a sound ㅠㅠ Exchanging it would be a hassle, and my pup plays with it well anyway so I'm just going to use it as is! If it breaks, I'm 200% buying it again! Highly recommend the Gom Dori ball toy~!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
울 강아지 최애 장난감 바꼈어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 처음이에요..!
마카롱 삑삑이 이긴 장난감입니다..!
장난감 새로 사줘도 항상 금방 지겨워해서 슬펐는데 요거는 3개 들어있어서 돌아가면서 빨아서 써도 계속 놀 수 있어요(쉬는시간이 없습니다🥲) 빨간색 특히 좋아해요ㅎㅎ
저 방금도 거의 삼십분동안 요걸로 축구하고 왔어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
이웃 강아지랑도 함께 애견카페 갔을 때 챙겨갔는데 요거 너무 좋아해서 하나 더 사서 하나씩 친구들 나눠줄까 생각중이에요ㅎㅎㅎ
비록 삑삑이 하나는 죽었지만 죽은 것도 좋아합니다🥰
reviews.content_en: My pup's favorite toy changed! This is the first time..! This toy beat the Macaron squeaky toy! I was sad because my pup always got bored of new toys quickly, but since this comes with 3, even rotating through them she keeps playing (there's no rest time 🥲) She especially loves the red one~ I literally just played soccer with this for almost 30 minutes lol When I went to the dog cafe with a neighbor's dog, I brought this and she loved it so much I'm thinking of buying another one to give one to each friend lol Even though one squeaker is dead, she still loves it 🥰

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 지금까지  몇  번째  구입인지  모르겠어요. 곰도리  공놀이  세트  정말  좋아합니다. 소형견에  낮게  사이즈  작고  통통  튀는  재미에  삑삑이  소리까지  이만한  장난감이  없습니다.
reviews.content_en: I've lost count of how many times I've bought this. I really love the Gom Dori ball play set. For small breed dogs the size is small and bounces so well with that squeaky sound too - there's no toy like this.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 입에 물고 씹기 딱 좋은 사이즈에 소리가 커서 엄청 좋아합니다. 제품설명에 냄새가 난다고 표기되어 있지만 이정도로 심할지 예상 못했습니다. 안전하다고 하지만 꺼림직해서 안주고 있어요.
reviews.content_en: The size is perfect for holding and chewing, and I love it because it makes a loud sound. The product description mentions it has a smell, but I didn't expect it to be this strong. Even though it's supposed to be safe, I'm hesitant about it so I'm not giving it to my dog.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
노랑은 사진 안 찍혔는데
슬개골탈구 때문에ㅠ ㅜ
공놀이는 하지 말라고 해서
치웠다 리뷰땜에 꺼내니
바로 다가오네요

삑삑 소리 내주면 더 좋아하고
소리 없이 튕겨주기만 해도
엄청 좋아해요

산책서 만난 프렌치 불독 친구에게
빨강 줬었는데...삼키려고 했다면서
나중에 돌려줘서 받았어요;;
지금 보니 친구가 열심히 갖고 놀았나
공의 박음질이 좀 벌어진 곳 있고
누르니 삑삑 소리가 안 나네요

세 개 모두 귀엽고 탄력성 짱짱하고 삑삑 소리 잘 났어요
reviews.content_en: I didn't get a photo of the yellow one 😭 Because of patellar luxation, they told me not to play with balls so I put it away. When I took it out because of the reviews, my dog came right over! 🎾 She loves it even more when it squeaks, and she's totally happy just bouncing it around silently too. I gave the red one to a French Bulldog friend I met on a walk, but apparently he tried to swallow it so they gave it back later 😅 Now I can see the friend played with it a lot – there are some seams that have come apart and the squeak doesn't work anymore when I press it. But all three are super cute, have great elasticity, and the squeakers worked perfectly at first!

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content: 너무너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅜ 한바탕 했더니 축축해져서 빨았어요… 장난감성애자 강쥐 하나는 한 시간 만에 축축해져서 빨았어요…
reviews.content_en: She plays with it SO much 😭 After one intense play session it got wet so I washed it... One toy-obsessed pup got it soaked in just an hour and I had to wash it again...

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 사장님 요기 혹시 약물같은거 넣으신건 아니신지.. 우리애가 공을 많이 좋아하긴 하는데 만4년동안 이렇게까지 좋아하는 공은 첨봅니다 첨엔 새장난감이라 그러려니 했는데 10일동안 잘때도 끼고자고 먹을때도 물마실때도 계속 갖고있어요  공놀이를 너무 많이해서 급수량도 늘어났어요  그래서 좋기도하고 공또라이가되서 걱정되고..ㅎㅎㅎ 암튼 최애 장난감이 됐어요 삑삑이도 망가짐없이 소리 잘 나옵니다  혹시 단종될까봐 쟁여놔야겠어요😆
reviews.content_en: Boss, you didn't put anything like drugs in there, right? 😂 My pup does like balls, but in 4 years I've never seen her love a ball this much. At first I thought it was just because it's a new toy, but for 10 days straight she carries it with her while sleeping, eating, and drinking 🐶 She plays with the ball so much that her water intake has increased! So I'm happy but also worried she's becoming ball-obsessed 😅 Anyway, it's become her favorite toy! The squeaker hasn't broken and still sounds great. I'm worried it might get discontinued so I should stock up 😆

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
장난감중에 공을 젤 좋아하는데 삑삑이도 엄청좋고 무엇보다 통통튀는게 넘 좋은거같아용
최애장난감 등극입니댜♥️
reviews.content_en: My pup loves balls most among all toys, and the squeaker is amazing, but most of all the bouncy part is just the best 💕 It's earned the title of favorite toy! ♥️

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 뽁뽁 소리가 나니 물고 다니면서 잘 놀아요:) 털공은 털이 빠져서 먹기도 해서 걱정인데, 곰도리 공은 소재도 걱정 없이 아주 좋아요 ㅎㅎㅎ 귀엽고 강추해요
reviews.content_en: It makes a popping sound so she carries it around and plays with it well :) I'm worried about the fur ball because the fur falls out and she eats it, but the teddy ball is made of a safe material so no concerns at all 😊 It's cute and highly recommended!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워용 ㅎ 바잇미 장난감들이 젤 튼튼하고 이뻐서 신상은 무조건 구매합니다~
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 🙂 BITE ME toys are the most durable and pretty, so I always buy their new products ~

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
우리아이는 빽빽이 공 입에 쏘옥 들어오는장난감을 좋아해요.너무좋아하네요
색상도이쁘고 소리도 잘나고. 가성비정말좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves toys that fit perfectly in her mouth like this squeaky ball. She loves it so much! The colors are pretty too and the sound works great. Really good value for the price!

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무 좋아해요ㅠㅠ
산지 일주일정도 됐는데 맨날 물고 빨고 하다보니 
공2개 삑삑이 바로 사망해서 또 구매했어요
산책갈때도 물고 나가요....
잠자기 직전까지 물고 있어요....
reviews.content_en: I love it so much 😭😭 It's only been a week since I bought it, but from constantly chewing and sucking on it, 2 balls and the squeakers died immediately so I bought them again. She even carries it when we go for walks... She has it in her mouth right up until bedtime...

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 배송 하루만에 왔어요! 완전 총알배송!!! 강아지.입에 딱 맞아서 엄청 좋아하고 계속 물어오네요!! 완전 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It arrived in just one day! Super fast shipping!!! 🚀 It fits perfectly in my dog's mouth so she loves it and keeps bringing it back! Absolutely love it!
